full_text:
Qi Zhou 齊周
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qi Zhou (齊周)was born in Yuyang. A clerical officer, joined in the revolt against Gongsun Zan under Liu He. Qi Zhou was affiliated with Liu Yu and Yuan Shao.
